title: meterana palustris
intro: Meterana palustris, also known as Marsh Meterana or Marsh Meteran, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is valued for its potential to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Meterana palustris include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Meterana palustris include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
